nasb.text: Now there were four leprous men at the entrance of the gate; and they said to one another, “Why do we sit here until we die?

esv.text: Now there were four men who were lepers  at the entrance to the gate. And they said to one another, “Why are we sitting here until we die?

cnv.text: 有四個痲風病人在城門口那裡，他們彼此說：“我們為甚麼坐在這裡等死呢？

ccb.text: 城门口有四个麻风病人，他们商量说：“我们为什么坐在这里等死呢？
